description:
Configure the store for a 'Soft Launch' state. Create and enable a CMS Page titled 'Coming Soon' with URL Key 'coming-soon' and content '

We are launching soon!

Stay tuned for our grand opening.

'. Set this new page as the Default Web URL (CMS Home Page) and enable the 'Display Demo Store Notice' in the store configuration. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
